content:
🚀 openclaude | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide developers with a single, consistent command-line interface for interacting with a wide variety of AI coding models, both cloud-based and local, streamlining their development workflow.
✨ Key Features: • Unified CLI for multiple AI model providers (OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama, GitHub Models, Codex, etc.) • Terminal-first workflow with prompts, tools, agents, MCP, and slash commands
📖 Summary: OpenClaude is an open-source, terminal-first coding agent CLI that unifies access to over 200 AI models, including OpenAI, Gemini, and local options like Ollama. It provides a consistent workflow for developers to interact with various AI backends for coding tasks, leveraging features like slash commands, agents, and streaming output.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
